title: Extending the GTAP Framework for Public Procurement Analysis

summary.about: A better way to represent government procurement in global trade-policy models.
summary.audience: Government procurement officials, trade negotiators and CGE model developers.
summary.method: Disaggregates government investment and import origins in GTAP, modifies the model and demonstrates an illustrative application.
summary.insights: Detailed procurement data are essential for estimating how discriminatory purchasing rules affect trade, employment and welfare.
